intro: Cryptocurrency and technology sectors were the primary targets in a series of seven high-severity incidents attributed to North Korean-linked activity between April 13 and April 24, 2026. The Lazarus Group, APT37 (ScarCruft, InkySquid), and Sapphire Sleet were the top threat actors observed, with impacts felt across Global, Asia, Europe, and North America. The finance, software development, and venture capital sectors also faced significant threats during this period.
